category_sources: source_facts.description: Terminal document viewer for .docx files.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/bgreenwell/doxx, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a terminal viewer for .docx files; source_facts.executables lists doxx.
